title: taraxacum kjellmanii
intro: Taraxacum kjellmanii, also known as Arctic dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate digestive issues, skin problems, and other health concerns. The health benefits of Taraxacum kjellmanii include supporting liver function, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
